clean.help: Clean and format the project code.
clean.option.check: Exit with error if changes are needed
clean.not_clean: Code is not clean; run `autoship clean`.
commit.help: Generate a commit message and commit staged/unstaged changes.
commit.editor_error: Editor exited with code {code}; commit message was not saved.
init.help: Initialize an AutoShip configuration file for the current project.
plugin.list_help: List registered plugins and their trust levels.
plugin.search_help: Search the official plugin registry index.
plugin.install_help: Install a plugin package and register it locally.
plugin.uninstall_help: Uninstall a plugin package and remove it from the local registry.
plugin.trust_help: Update the trust level of a registered plugin.
plugin.header.name: Name
doctor.help: Diagnose the AutoShip environment and dependencies.
doctor.title: AutoShip Environment Diagnostics
doctor.git_suggestion: Install Git and ensure it is on PATH.
doctor.clean_suggestion: Install missing tools or run `autoship clean` will skip them.
doctor.model_suggestion: Run `autoship init` or edit `.autoship.toml` to add a local model.
doctor.model_unreachable: Configured model backend is not reachable
doctor.model_start: Start your local model server (Ollama/LM Studio) and verify base_url.
doctor.plugin_suggestion: Install tools for the plugins you want to use; unrelated plugins will still work.
doctor.dirs_suggestion: Ensure HOME is set and writable.
upload.help: Upload artifacts to a configured target.
upload.option.tag: Docker image tag or GitHub release tag
verify.help: Run a verification command and capture errors for AI-assisted fixing.
verify.option.fix: Ask the model to suggest fixes on failure
verify.command_not_found: Verification command not found on PATH: {cmd}
audit.export_help: Export audit logs to a JSON Lines file.
audit.cleanup_help: Remove audit log files older than the retention period.
audit.option.since: Export records after this time (ISO or 1d/7d/30d)
audit.cleanup_dry_run: [dry-run] Would remove old audit log files
